title: CANTBREATHE
body:
**REQUIRES GECKOLIB**

_It is recommended you play with music off and ambient sounds turned down when playing this mod_

 

CANTBREATHE is the manifestation of all beings fears. He maliciously seeks out his victims, wishing to cause and inflict unbearable pain to them. There is no real escape from this being, and you are never truly safe.

 

CANTBREATHE will spawn around your world rarely and unpredictably, he is sensitive to eye contact and can detect when you are glancing at him or making direct eye contact with him. if spotted or caught glancing at him, he will do 1 of 3 things.

Flee Quickly

Point and Stare

Run Full Speed at the Individual which looked at him

 

**1.20.1 version is incapable of breaking blocks, sorry.

Credits:

SiverDX/Gargin: Cave Dweller AI

ClouddyVR/Radiance: Block Breaking Code and Leaping

AshenWulf: New CANTBREATHE model


JOIN THE DISCORD!

https://discord.gg/jzkFsQ5Mas**
